title: Co-Sponsor the Naabathon
brief: This proposal seeks to allocate 6,000,000 ATLAS from the DAO treasury to co-sponsor the first Star Atlas ecosystem hackathon, the Naabathon. The proposed allocation would increase the prize pool for winners, who also will be receiving prizes from other hackathon co-sponsors.
description:
# PIP-5 (Co-Sponsor the Naabathon)

# HEADER

**Category:** Funding

**Author:** The Star Atlas Foundation

---

# SUMMARY

This proposal seeks to allocate 6,000,000 ATLAS from the DAO treasury to co-sponsor the first Star Atlas ecosystem hackathon, the Naabathon. The proposed allocation would increase the prize pool for winners, who also will be receiving prizes from other hackathon co-sponsors.

---

# MOTIVATION

The growth of Star Atlas is driven in large part by its global community of builders, and a principal function of the treasury is to incentivize those builders. The Naabathon is the first Star Atlas hackathon and is intended to spur the creation of new applications that develop the Star Atlas ecosystem.

The Naabathon — inspired by the Punaabs of Ogrika Industries — is co-sponsored by ATMTA, Inc., which is organizing the event, paying costs related to the hosting of the event (including the live awards ceremony), and supplying a total of $25,000 worth of game assets, including an Ogrika Sunpaa for the overall winner of the hackathon and an Ogrika Tursic for each category winner.

The Naabathon also is adding co-sponsors known throughout the web3 community, whose participation will be announced in the coming weeks. Other co-sponsors will supply USDC to be added to the prize pool for Naabathon winners.

The hackathon will take place digitally (without an in-person requirement) over the coming months, with the last day for submissions taking place on September 7, 2024. The event will culminate in a live awards ceremony on September 21, 2024 during the Star Atlas Impact Summit, which is hosted by ATMTA, Inc. in Singapore during the Solana Breakpoint conference.

This proposal seeks to add the Star Atlas DAO as a co-sponsor of the hackathon to further motivate builders with ATLAS prizes.  Most importantly, a co-sponsorship would serve to highlight the DAO’s critical role in growing and developing the ecosystem and make the DAO’s activities better known to attendees at Solana Breakpoint 2024. 

---

# SPECIFICATION

The Naabathon will have six categories, with a winner selected from each:

- **SAGE:** applications that interact with the SAGE.
- **Galactic Marketplace:** applications that interact with the Galactic Marketplace.
- **Resources:** applications that use any of the Star Atlas consumable resources in a meaningful way.
- **Data:** applications that display meaningful live data for Star Atlas products.
- **DeFi:** applications that use ATLAS or POLIS in a meaningful way.
- **Game:** a game that uses any Star Atlas tokens, resources, or intellectual property.

An overall **Best Project** winner also will be selected from all submissions.  

The prize pool for the overall and category winners includes ships and USDC supplied by co-sponsors. This proposal seeks to have ATLAS added to the prize pool such that each category winner receives 750,000 ATLAS and the overall winner receives 1,500,000 ATLAS for a total of 6,000,000 ATLAS.

As a co-sponsor, the Star Atlas DAO would receive prominent recognition in Naabathon marketing materials and during the live awards event at the Star Atlas Impact Summit. Further information on the event can be found at [https://naabathon.staratlas.com/](https://naabathon.staratlas.com/).

---

# IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS

If approved, the Star Atlas Foundation will enter into a co-sponsor agreement with ATMTA, Inc. and will disburse 6,000,000 ATLAS from the DAO treasury.

The Naabathon itself will be organized by ATMTA, Inc., with submissions made and judged in accordance with applicable hackathon rules.

---

# TIMELINE

This PIP can be implemented immediately once approved, with the Star Atlas Foundation overseeing any continued implementation through the end of the Naabathon on September 21, 2024.

---

# COST

The total cost to the Star Atlas DAO is 6,000,000 ATLAS. Other costs related to the Naabathon are borne by other co-sponsors.
